Dr. Anjali Desai
Clinical Research Associate, New York, NY
anjali.desai@example.com | 555-201-3014 | linkedin.com/in/anjali-desai-cra

SUMMARY
Clinical research associate with 5 years monitoring oncology and immunology
clinical trials. Experienced in GCP-compliant site monitoring, regulatory
submissions, and clinical data management across Phase I–III studies.

EXPERIENCE
Clinical Research Associate — Helix Therapeutics (2021–present)
- Monitor Phase II–III oncology clinical trials across 15 sites, conducting
  source-data verification and ensuring protocol and Good Clinical Practice (GCP)
  compliance.
- Prepare regulatory submissions and maintain trial master files for FDA and IRB
  review; track adverse events and pharmacovigilance reporting.
- Train site coordinators on protocol amendments and oversee clinical data
  collection and query resolution.

Clinical Research Coordinator — Mount Sinai Research (2019–2021)
- Coordinated study start-up, patient enrollment, informed consent, and data
  collection for early-phase immunology trials.

SKILLS
Clinical research, clinical trials, GCP, protocol, monitoring, source-data
verification, regulatory affairs, FDA, IRB, pharmacovigilance, clinical data
management, trial master file, life sciences, oncology, ICH-GCP

EDUCATION
Ph.D. Molecular Biology, Weill Cornell Medicine, 2019
B.S. Biology, Rutgers University, 2013
